query:
INSERT INTO `subscriptions` (`userId`, `tierId`, `startDate`) 
SELECT u.id, 1, NOW() 
FROM `users` u 
WHERE u.username = 'test11' 
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `tierId` = 1, `startDate` = NOW();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute INSERT INTO `subscriptions` (`userId`, `tierId`, `startDate`) 
SELECT u.id, 1, NOW() 
FROM `users` u 
WHERE u.username = 'test11' 
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `tierId` = 1, `startDate` = NOW();
